---
pagetitle: "Talks · Sushovan Majhi"
title: ""
toc: false
listing:
  - id: talks-all
    contents: talks.yml
    template: ejs/talks.ejs
    sort: "date desc"
---

```{=html}
<header class="masthead page">
  <div class="kicker">Sushovan Majhi</div>
  <div class="pub-title">Talks &amp; Presentations</div>
  <div class="edition">
    <span>Invited lectures, conference talks, and seminars</span>
    <span>15 talks listed</span>
  </div>
</header>
```

::: {#talks-all}
:::
